text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle seems especially distracted during
our training session.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh... That cloud looks just like a good cut of steak. Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
...Sorry, Trainer. With all these races lately, I'm
kinda runnin' outta power...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sigh... How can I make anybody happy feelin' like this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Running all those back-to-back races is taking its
toll on her. I'd better adjust her race schedule.
